body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Allow someone to choose diagnostics by passing a vector of strings instead of just :long or :short.

By reducing the number of diagnostics in the fluxnet simulation using this, the time to solve went from 165 seconds to 105 seconds.

cc @ychnli 

Not using any diagnostics -> down to 84 seconds (note that I didnt measure this super carefully, this is the time to execute `solve` but I didnt take a step first)
## To-do
<!---  list of proposed tasks in the PR, move to "Content" on completion 
- Proposed task
-->


## Content
<!---  specific tasks that are currently complete 
- Solution implemented
-->

- relevant unit tests, and integration tests, 
- appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevant documentation.

-->

title: improve diagnostics interface; reduce fluxnet sim time

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Adds constructors at the model level for the following canopy components:
- energy
- hydraulics
- autotrophic respiration
- radiative transfer
- photosynthesis
- stomatal conductance


## Content - new constructors
- AutotrophicRespirationModel
- BigLeafEnergyModel
  - exposed params: ac_canopy
- PlantHydraulicsModel
  - exposed params: LAI, SAI, RAI, nu, S_s, K_sat, psi63, c, a, rooting depth
- TwoStreamModel
  - exposed params: eps_canopy, lambda_gamma_PAR, n_layers
- BeerLambertModel
  - exposed params: eps_canopy, lambda_gamma_PAR
- FarquharModel
  - exposed params: sc, pc
- MedlynConductanceModel
  - exposed params: g0, g1

<!---

title: Add convenience constructors for canopy model components
